items.title: Analysis: while social media rewards sensationalism and inflammatory content, LLMs guide people away from extreme positions and towards expert-aligned stances (John Burn-Murdoch/Financial Times)
items.title_original: Analysis: while social media rewards sensationalism and inflammatory content, LLMs guide people away from extreme positions and towards expert-aligned stances (John Burn-Murdoch/Financial Times)
items.title_en: Analysis: while social media rewards sensationalism and inflammatory content, LLMs guide people away from extreme positions and towards expert-aligned stances (John Burn-Murdoch/Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 分析：虽然社交媒体奖励煽情和煽动性内容，但法学硕士引导人们远离极端立场，采取与专家一致的立场（约翰·伯恩-默多克/金融时报）
items.title_bilingual: 分析：虽然社交媒体奖励煽情和煽动性内容，但法学硕士引导人们远离极端立场，采取与专家一致的立场（约翰·伯恩-默多克/金融时报） / Analysis: while social media rewards sensationalism and inflammatory content, LLMs guide people away from extreme positions and towards expert-aligned stances (John Burn-Murdoch/Financial Times)

items.title: A study of 11 leading LLMs finds the models more agreeable than humans when giving interpersonal advice, affirming users' behavior even when harmful or illegal (Stanford University)
items.title_original: A study of 11 leading LLMs finds the models more agreeable than humans when giving interpersonal advice, affirming users' behavior even when harmful or illegal (Stanford University)
items.title_en: A study of 11 leading LLMs finds the models more agreeable than humans when giving interpersonal advice, affirming users' behavior even when harmful or illegal (Stanford University)
items.title_zh: 一项针对 11 名领先法学硕士的研究发现，在提供人际建议、肯定用户的行为（即使是有害或非法的情况下）时，这些模型比人类更令人愉快（斯坦福大学）
items.title_bilingual: 一项针对 11 名领先法学硕士的研究发现，在提供人际建议、肯定用户的行为（即使是有害或非法的情况下）时，这些模型比人类更令人愉快（斯坦福大学） / A study of 11 leading LLMs finds the models more agreeable than humans when giving interpersonal advice, affirming users' behavior even when harmful or illegal (Stanford University)

items.title: Vinod Khosla says AI is accelerating a shift of wealth and power away from workers, and an income tax overhaul in the US could offset voter fears about job loss (Financial Times)
items.title_original: Vinod Khosla says AI is accelerating a shift of wealth and power away from workers, and an income tax overhaul in the US could offset voter fears about job loss (Financial Times)
items.title_en: Vinod Khosla says AI is accelerating a shift of wealth and power away from workers, and an income tax overhaul in the US could offset voter fears about job loss (Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 维诺德·科斯拉 (Vinod Khosla) 表示，人工智能正在加速财富和权力从工人手中转移，美国的所得税改革可能会抵消选民对失业的担忧（金融时报）
items.title_bilingual: 维诺德·科斯拉 (Vinod Khosla) 表示，人工智能正在加速财富和权力从工人手中转移，美国的所得税改革可能会抵消选民对失业的担忧（金融时报） / Vinod Khosla says AI is accelerating a shift of wealth and power away from workers, and an income tax overhaul in the US could offset voter fears about job loss (Financial Times)

items.title: Qualified Health, which helps health systems evaluate and adopt AI tools, raised a $125M Series B led by NEA at a valuation of between $500M and $1B (Heather Landi/Fierce Healthcare)

items.title: A look at why Dotcom Bubble comparisons to the AI boom are off, vertical SaaS is up +3% last 12 months vs. horizontal SaaS down 35%, and other reflections on AI (Logan Bartlett/@loganbartlett)

items.title_zh: 看看为什么互联网泡沫与 AI 繁荣的比较有所不同，垂直 SaaS 在过去 12 个月中增长了 3%，而水平 SaaS 下降了 35%，以及对 AI 的其他反思 (Logan Bartlett/@loganbartlett)
items.title_bilingual: 看看为什么互联网泡沫与 AI 繁荣的比较有所不同，垂直 SaaS 在过去 12 个月中增长了 3%，而水平 SaaS 下降了 35%，以及对 AI 的其他反思 (Logan Bartlett/@loganbartlett) / A look at why Dotcom Bubble comparisons to the AI boom are off, vertical SaaS is up +3% last 12 months vs. horizontal SaaS down 35%, and other reflections on AI (Logan Bartlett/@loganbartlett)
